# Managing a Subscription

A subscription can be paused, skipped, or rescheduled from the subscriptions tab in the account, and changes made at least two days before the next scheduled charge take effect immediately. Cancelling a subscription stops all future charges but does not reimbursement a shipment that has already been billed.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#managing-a-subscription]
